narrative:
Springboro City 3-A (precinct in Warren County) has 833 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
